description_long: This object is a rectangular juice carton with a peaked top, resembling the classic milk or juice box design. The exterior is primarily a faded peach and white color, with visible wear and stains suggesting it has been exposed to the elements or handled frequently. One side features faint text and a subtle flower-like graphic, likely indicating the flavor or brand, though the details are hard to discern. The top of the carton is folded into a gable shape, with a small spout or closure at the peak, typical for pouring. The back side appears to have a barcode and possibly some product information, but the text is not clearly legible. The overall appearance is that of a standard juice carton, commonly found discarded or placed in urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or near vending machines.
description: A worn, rectangular juice carton with a peaked top, faded peach and white coloring, and subtle graphics and text. The carton shows signs of use and weathering, with a small spout at the top for pouring.
description_view_0: This view shows the peaked side of the carton, mostly white with some peach at the top and visible stains.
description_view_1: The front face displays faint text and a flower-like graphic, with a mix of peach and white coloring.
description_view_2: The opposite peaked side is more peach-colored, with less visible text and some smudging.
description_view_3: The back face shows a barcode and some faded text, with a mostly peach and white surface.
